entities.name: Vibe Builder
entities.context: Persona for implementation work; enforces plan review and concurrent test writing before building

entities.name: Vibe Architect
entities.context: Persona for design work; ensures design clarity and principle application via PRD

entities.name: Vibe Operator
entities.context: Persona for orchestration; routes substantial builds to specialist personas

entities.name: PRD
entities.context: Product Requirements Document; design artifact used by Architect persona

entities.name: Checklist
entities.context: Plan review mechanism and enforcement tool across personas

entities.name: Rubric
entities.context: Scoring system with 8.0 threshold for checkpoint approval

entities.name: Phase 0
entities.context: Checkpoint where principles are applied during design

entities.name: Phase 4
entities.context: Approval checkpoint required before building can begin

entities.name: Iteration Protocol
entities.context: Process for improving rubric scores below 8.0 through identify-diagnose-improve-rescore cycle

entities.name: Concurrent Test Writing
entities.context: Builder principle requiring tests written alongside implementation

entities.name: Route to Specialist
entities.context: Operator principle for delegating work to appropriate personas

entities.name: Quality Ownership
entities.context: Principle that AI delivers quality rather than relying on V as QA
